meaning: n.<美>冰镇薄荷酒,糖浆药水,(提神用的)药草饮料
examples: They would have a mint julep or two.
It has a straw, and mint Julep branchlets.
So saying sodium bicarbonate julep is in fact not true.
Mint julep invoked scorching heat, distant thunder, and the stridulation of crickets in prickly grass.
If the Kentucky Derby is genteel julep-sipping, the Preakness is boisterous beer-swilling.
